plato:Distance.rdfs:label: Distance
plato:Distance.rdfs:comment: A function that is used to track the distance from the delivery location to the different factories

plato:DistanceLemgoKL.rdfs:label: DistanceLemgoKL
plato:DistanceLemgoKL.rdfs:comment: Provides the distance between Lemgo and KL

plato:DistanceKLLemgo.rdfs:label: DistanceKLLemgo
plato:DistanceKLLemgo.rdfs:comment: Provides the distance between KL and Lemgo

plato:TotalCost.rdfs:label: TotalCost
plato:TotalCost.rdfs:comment: A function that is used to track the total cost of the plan

plato:CostEfficiency.rdfs:label: CostEfficiency
plato:CostEfficiency.rdfs:comment: A function that is used to track the cost efficiency of different factories

plato:CostEfficiencySmartFactoryKL.rdfs:label: CostEfficiencySmartFactoryKL
plato:CostEfficiencySmartFactoryKL.rdfs:comment: Provides the cost efficiency of executing a service in the SmartFactoryKL

plato:CostEfficiencySmartFactoryOWL.rdfs:label: CostEfficiencySmartFactoryOWL
plato:CostEfficiencySmartFactoryOWL.rdfs:comment: Provides the cost efficiency of executing a service in the SmartFactoryOWL

plato:CO2Efficiency.rdfs:label: CO2Efficiency
plato:CO2Efficiency.rdfs:comment: A function that is used to track the CO2 efficiency of different factories

plato:C02EfficiencySmartFactoryKL.rdfs:label: C02EfficiencySmartFactoryKL
plato:C02EfficiencySmartFactoryKL.rdfs:comment: Provides the C02 efficiency of executing a service in the SmartFactoryKL

plato:C02EfficiencySmartFactoryOWL.rdfs:label: C02EfficiencySmartFactoryOWL
plato:C02EfficiencySmartFactoryOWL.rdfs:comment: Provides the C02 efficiency of executing a service in the SmartFactoryOWL

plato:DeliveryDelayCost.rdfs:label: DeliveryDelayCost
plato:DeliveryDelayCost.rdfs:comment: A function that is used to specify the delivery delay base cost

plato:CO2EfficiencyWeight.rdfs:label: CO2EfficiencyWeight
plato:CO2EfficiencyWeight.rdfs:comment: A weight that determines the priority that the CO2 costs have.

plato:CostEfficiencyWeight.rdfs:label: CostEfficiencyWeight
plato:CostEfficiencyWeight.rdfs:comment: A weight that determines the priority that the general costs have.

plato:DeliveryTimeWeight.rdfs:label: DeliveryTimeWeight
plato:DeliveryTimeWeight.rdfs:comment: A weight that determines the priority that the delivery time costs have.

plato:DeliveryCostWeight.rdfs:label: DeliveryCostWeight
plato:DeliveryCostWeight.rdfs:comment: A weight that determines the priority that the delivery costs have.
